languages.title: Ilimi
languages.subtitle: Khetha ilimi elisetjenziswa kiyo yoke i-app.

phone.label: Inomboro yomtato
phone.searchCountry: Setjha inarha, ikhodi, nofana isiqalo sokudayela
phone.invalid: Faka inomboro yomtato esebenzako yelizwe elikhethiweko.

auth.onboardingTagline: Umngani wezokuphepha weenkhathi eziphakathi kokuthi "Ngilungile" nokuthi "Ngidinga isizo."
auth.createSubtitle: Khetha indlela yokungena ukuvikela igrafu yakho yokuphepha.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukuqeda ukungena ngemvumo. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzama godu.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Ukusebenzisa iseshini yokuthuthukisa yendawo. I-Native Google Ukungena ngemvume kusebenza ekwakhiweni kwentuthuko.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Hlanganisa nje nofana uragele phambili bese uyifaka ngokukhamba kwesikhathi.
auth.northStarBody: I-VL01 egqokwako ingavusa ukugeleza kokuphepha ngokuthepha nokugandelela isikhathi eside.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Umngani wakho omnene wokuphepha emephini nasezingcingweni.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ingasiza ngemodi yekhaya, imodi yomgadi, imodi yesimo esiphuthumako, ukubiza izaba, nokusekelwa ngephimbo.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Isetjenziselwa imephu, iindawo eziyingozi, ukufika okuphephileko, kanye nommongo we-SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ibuza indawo ukwenzela bona abatlhogomeli bazwisise lapho kungatlhogeka khona isizo. Ungatjhugulula lokhu ngokukhamba kwesikhathi kumaSethingi.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Izaziso zisekela ukuhlola kanye nezehlakalo eziphuthumako.
permissions.notificationsBody: Sisebenzisa izaziso kwaphela malungana nokuphepha, ukubuyekezwa okuphuthumako, kanye nezikhumbuzo ozivumelako.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa indawo yakho malungana nebalazwe lokuphepha, iindawo eziyingozi, ukwabelana okurhabako, kanye nobujamo be-SOS. Ungatjhugulula lokhu ngokukhamba kwesikhathi kumaSethingi.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ithumela iinkhumbuzo zokungena, iindaba eziphuthumako, kanye neenkhuthazo zokuphepha ozivumelako. Asisebenzisi izaziso zemikhangiso.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving isebenzisa imayikhrofoni yakho kwaphela lokha nawuthoma AI ukubiza umngani namkha ukuphepha.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: I-VeryLoving isebenzisa i-Bluetooth ukuhlanganisa ne-NorthStar ubucwebe, ukufunda ubujamo bokuthintana, nokuvusa ukugeleza kokuphepha okuvela ekugqokeni.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving igcina ukugeleza lokhu kutholakala kumaSethingi nedeshibhodi.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Khetha iphimbo lomngani elizwakala liphephile ukulizwa.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Ukuthepha okuhlanu kungakhuphukela ku-SOS kanye nezexwayiso zomgadi.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Yenza isizathu esihle sokutjhiya ubujamo obumbi.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Thoma ukubiza umngani wesikhathi sangempela lokha nawufuna ukusekelwa.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Linga ukugeleza kokuphepha emfanekisweni onomfutho ophasi.

jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukghoni ukuthoma. Sibawa ulinge godu.
jewelry.scanFailed: Asikwazanga ukuthola ubucwebe obuseduze. Hlola Bluetooth, gcina NorthStar eduze, bese uzama godu.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ukuskena akukghoni ukuthoma. Hlola Bluetooth ukufinyelela bese uzama godu.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Ukufinyelela kwedivayisi eseduze kuvaliwe. Vumela i-Bluetooth ukufikelela kumaSethingi, bese uzama godu.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar kuthathe isikhathi eside ukuxhuma. Yisondeze eduze bese uzama godu.
jewelry.connectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuxhumana ku-NorthStar. Hlola bona itjhajiwe begodu iseduze, bese uzama godu.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Gcina i-NorthStar itjhajiwe begodu iseduze nefowuni le, bese uskena godu.

map.title: Imephu yokuphepha
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ukubuka ngaphambilini; Mapbox iveza ekwakhiweni kwentuthuko.
map.updateFailed: Asikwazanga ukubuyekeza indawo yakho. Sibawa ulinge godu.
map.notRequested: Ukufikelela indawo bekungakacelwa. Ungayivumela ngokukhamba kwesikhathi ukusuka kumaSethingi.
map.permissionOff: Ukufinyelela kwendawo kuvaliwe. Yinike amandla ku-Settings ukubeka phakathi kwemephu yokuphepha kuwe.
map.timeout: Indawo yakho ithatha isikhathi eside kunangendlela ebekulindelwe ngayo. Hamba uye endaweni enesiginali ekhanyako bese uzama godu.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Iindawo ezithembekileko ozilondolozileko zizokuvela lapha ukuze zifinyeleleke msinyana.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.emptyMessage: Thoma ukufona nofana uthayiphe umlayezo lokha nasele ukulungele.

history.clearMessage: Lokhu kususa imilayezo egciniweko ye-AI ehambisana nayo kule divayisi.
history.title: Umlando wengcoco
history.subtitle: AI imilayezo ehambisanayo egcinwe kule divayisi.
history.emptyMessage: Iingcoco zakho ze-AI zizokuvela lapha ngemva kokubiza kwakho kokuthoma.
history.loadFailed: Asikwazanga ukulayisha umlando wengxoxo. Sibawa ulinge godu.
history.clearFailed: Asikwazanga ukusula umlando wengcoco. Sibawa ulinge godu.
history.deleteFailed: Asikwazanga ukususa ingcoco leyo. Sibawa ulinge godu.

voices.title: Amaphimbo wami wokubiza ngokuphepha
voices.subtitle: Khetha iphimbo lomngani elizwakala lilungile ukulizwa.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Isampula yephimbo le ayikwazanga ukudlalwa. Sibawa ulinge godu.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Sebenzisa iimpendulo ezihlangeneko lokha inethiwekhi nofana iimfanelo ze-Hume zingatholakali.
settings.privacyBody: Thumela namkha ususe idatha yendawo egcinwe kuledivayisi.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Lokhu kususa iphrofayili yakho, amasethingi, abathintwako besikhathi esiphuthumako, umlando wengcoco, izikhumbuzo zemvumo, kanye neseshini yokuqinisekisa yendawo kuledivayisi.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, abatlhogomeli, kanye nabathintwako besikhathi esiphuthumako
sections.privacySubtitle: Umlando, ukuthunyelwa ngaphandle, ukususwa, kanye nomthethomgomo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukusindisa ukukhetha lokho. Sibawa ulinge godu.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Iseshini yakho isasebenza. Sibawa ulinge godu.

contacts.title: Abathintwako besikhathi esiphuthumako
contacts.subtitle: Abantu abathembekileko bayatholakala ngesikhathi sokugeleza kokuphepha.
contacts.name: Ibizo
contacts.emptyTitle: Akukho oxhumana nabo ngesikhathi esiphuthumako okwamanje
contacts.emptyMessage: Faka umuntu omthembako ukwenzela bona alungele lokha ukuphepha nakufunako.
contacts.removeMessage: Umuntu lo angeze asavela emkhakheni wakho wezehlakalo eziphuthumako.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukulondoloza lokuthintana. Hlola imininingwana bese uzama godu.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Asikwazanga ukususa umuntu lo. Sibawa ulinge godu.

friends.title: Abangani
friends.subtitle: Abagcini, iimbawo, kanye negrafu yesimo esiphuthumako.
friends.emptyMessage: Abangani nabatlhogomeli abathembekileko bazokuvela lapha nasele bangezelelwe.

emergency.title: Rhabekileko SOS
emergency.subtitle: Khuphuka kwaphela lokha nawufuna ukusekelwa msinyana.
emergency.body: Lokhu kuzokwazisa ukugeleza kwakho kokuphepha begodu kulungiselele abathintwako besikhathi esiphuthumako.
emergency.addContact: Faka umuntu othintwako wesikhathi esiphuthumako kumaSethingi.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Isiqu sokwabelana ngendawo silungile. Xhuma indawo yokuphela yokwabelana ngemuva ukuthumela amalinki aphilako.

capybearTap.title: Capybear ipompi
capybearTap.subtitle: Thepha kabili i-NorthStar yakho ukuwisa i-orenji yokuphepha.
capybearTap.body: Indlela yokuziphatha ilungele ukufaka iintambo zomcimbi we-BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Ubonakala ungasebenzi ku-inthanethi. Umlayezo wakho uzokuthunyelwa lokha nawubuyela emuva.
errors.voiceQueued: Umlayezo ulondoloziwe. Izokuthunyelwa lokha umngani wephimbo nakabuye ahlanganise.
errors.microphone: Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kuyatlhogeka malungana namakholi wephimbo. Ungayivumela kumaSethingi, nofana uthayiphe umlayezo esikhundleni salokho.
errors.billing: Umngani wephimbo we-inthanethi awutholakali okwesikhatjhana. Ungaragela phambili nomngani ongekho ku-inthanethi.
errors.authentication: Umngani wephimbo akhenge akghone ukuqinisekisa iseshini le. Ngena ngemvume godu nofana usebenzise umngani ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi okwanje.
errors.timeout: Umngani welizwi wathatha isikhathi eside ukuphendula. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzama godu.
errors.network: Asikwazanga ukufikelela umngani welizwi. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho, bese uzama godu nofana uragele phambili ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
errors.genericVoice: Kukhona okuphazamise ukubiza ngephimbo. Linga godu, nofana uragele phambili nomngani ongekho ku-inthanethi.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving udinga ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni ukuphepha kanye AI nokubiza umngani.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving isebenzisa indawo yakho malungana nebalazwe lokuphepha kanye nezinto zokuphepha eziseduze.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving isebenzisa i-Bluetooth ukuxhumana ne-NorthStar ubucwebe bakho bokuphepha.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Indlela le yokungena ayitholakali kule nguqulo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Imodi yomboniso isebenzisa idatha yamanga egcinwe kudivayisi kuphela. Amasevisi axhunyiwe awaqinisekisiwe, futhi iseshini le isethwa kabusha lapho i-app ilayishwa kabusha.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Ikhodi yokuqinisekisa ayisebenzi noma isiphelelwe yisikhathi. Cela ikhodi entsha bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Miningi kakhulu imizamo yokungena. Linda kancane, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ukuqinisekisa ukungena kuthathe isikhathi eside kakhulu. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Asikwazanga ukufinyelela isevisi yokungena. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Iseshini yakho isiphelelwe yisikhathi. Ngena futhi.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Imephu yezokuphepha ayikwazanga ukulayisha. Hlola uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Indawo ebukhoma ayitholakali. Kuboniswa indawo yakho yokugcina egcinwe ngo-%{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Asikwazanga ukwabelana ngendawo yakho. Hlola imvume yendawo bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Nansi indawo yami yokugcina egcinwe, eqoshwe ngo-%{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ukufinyelela kwe-Bluetooth kuvaliwe. Kuvule kokuthi Izilungiselelo, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: I-Bluetooth ivaliwe. Yivule, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Ukumatanisa nge-Bluetooth akutholakali kule divayisi noma kule nguqulo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Asikwazanga ukuthola i-NorthStar. Yigcine iseduze, hlola i-Bluetooth, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Awekho amadivayisi e-NorthStar aseduze atholakele. Yigcine iseduze bese usesha futhi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Asikwazanga ukuxhuma ku-NorthStar. Yigcine ishajiwe futhi iseduze, bese uzama futhi.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Asikwazanga ukugcina le ndawo. Zama futhi.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Akekho umuntu wokuxhumana naye esimweni esiphuthumayo obetholakala; alukho ucingo olushayiwe.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Isidayeli sefoni asikwazanga ukuvuleka; alukho ucingo olushayiwe.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Umsizi wezwi akatholakali njengamanje. Zama futhi kamuva noma uqhubeke nomsizi ongaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Hlela umuntu wokuxhumana naye esimweni esiphuthumayo
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Umuntu wokuxhumana naye esimweni esiphuthumayo ubuyekeziwe.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
